decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.
Today 2026-06-15 — 1 Shorts publishing | 📅 TODAY v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q) at 12:00 UTC — status: SCHEDULED
Today 2026-06-15 — 1 Shorts publishing | 📅 TODAY v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q) at 12:00 UTC — status: SCHEDULED

v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q) was SCHEDULED@12:00Z in state but verified PUBLIC via oEmbed (HTTP 200 + full metadata 'Why Did the Teetotal Captain Run?') at 08:03Z — ~4h EARLY vs its 12:00Z slot. Controls validated probe (nonexistent id->404, known-public y3xLIfOAPHA->200). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=08:03Z + note. Recurrence of KNOWN_BAD schedule silent early-publish (cf. v3 ANSWER 5 days early).

Pipeline DRY beyond today: v1_bonus_briggs (06-15) is the LAST queued asset. Nothing scheduled for 06-16/06-17/06-18 vs the 2-3 Shorts/wk recovery cadence. v4 Roanoke still blocked on Google Flow thumb gen (submit button disabled since 06-13). No long-form queued for next Sunday 06-21 (17:00Z). ACTION: unblock Flow + render/schedule v4 batch before rhythm breaks.

voidline Studio stealth session (yt_upload, cookie_profile=voidline) idle ~14h sitting on accounts.google.com signin redirect — possible cookie staleness. Not confirmed logged-out (stale idle URL). Verify on next Studio action; if login wall persists -> escalate cookie re-auth (2FA).
